Container.Name: AgenticSeek-Frontend
Container.Overview: AgenticSeek Frontend — the React web interface for AgenticSeek, a 100% local, private AI assistant. Open the WebUI link below in your browser once this container and the AgenticSeek-Backend container are running.
Container.Requires: AgenticSeek-Backend container must be running before opening the UI.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the AgenticSeek React frontend. Open http://[SERVER-IP]:3000 in your browser.

Config.Name: Screenshots Path
Config.Description: Path where screenshots taken by the browser automation agent are saved.

Config.Name: Backend URL
Config.Description: Full URL of the AgenticSeek backend reachable from your browser. Replace [SERVER-IP] with the actual IP address or hostname of your Unraid server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:7777).

Config.Name: Node Environment
Config.Description: Node.js environment mode. Use 'production' for normal use or 'development' for live-reload during development.
